core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix SaaS precision with Creator Economy vibrancy
Emotion First: Every interaction must feel 'fast' and 'empowering'
Content is King: Data is the hero, UI is the stage
Negative Space: 2x standard spacing for luxury feel
anti_patterns: No 100% filled grids - leave breathing room

effects.tracing_beam: Use framer-motion to animate border colors on active cards
effects.noise_overlay: opacity-5 mix-blend-overlay pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]

layout_strategies.dashboard_grid: Bento Grid Mode B (High Density): grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4
layout_strategies.marketing_grid: Tetris Grid Mode A: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-bold py-3 px-6 rounded-lg shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(37,99,235,0.3)] transition-all transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 text-white border border-slate-700 font-medium py-3 px-6 rounded-lg

inputs.default: bg-slate-950/50 border-slate-800 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 rounded-md h-12 text-slate-200 placeholder:text-slate-600

cards.stat_card: flex flex-col p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-800 bg-slate-900/50 hover:bg-slate-900 transition-colors
cards.pipeline_column: bg-slate-900/30 border border-slate-800/50 rounded-xl p-4 min-h-[500px]

ai_sidebar.container: w-80 border-l border-slate-800 bg-slate-950/90 backdrop-blur-sm fixed right-0 h-full p-6
ai_sidebar.suggestion_card: p-4 rounded-lg bg-indigo-500/10 border border-indigo-500/20 hover:border-indigo-500/50 cursor-pointer transition-all

implementation_steps: 1. Setup Theme: Configure tailwind.config.js with the deep dark palette (hsl values).
2. Global CSS: Add @fontsource imports and setup base styles in index.css (remove default react css).
3. Layout Shell: Create a Sidebar Layout (Shadcn Sidebar or Custom) + Top Header.
4. Dashboard: Implement Bento Grid with Recharts (Line/Bar charts) + Stat Cards.
5. CRM Page: Split view (List Left, Thread Right) with 'High Density' spacing.
6. AI Features: Add 'Sparkle' icon and 'Tracing Beam' effect for AI suggestions.
universal_guidelines: Never use 'alert' or 'confirm' - use Shadcn Dialog.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid dark colors + subtle borders.
JS Only: Since the environment is JS, rename any .tsx reference to .jsx or .js in your mind.
For tables (Leads), use Shadcn Table with 'dense' row styling.
Add 'dark' class to html/body by default.
